features.name: Material Sense
features.description: Make Awareness checks to identify the composition, age, and origin of objects by touch.

features.name: Perfect Senses
features.description: Make Awareness checks to identify sounds, voices, or musical notes with supernatural precision. Make Intelligence checks to know the exact time, date, or duration of events without external references. Make Intelligence checks to determine exact location, direction, and distance to any place you've been before.

features.name: Eidetic Memory
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to recall any information you've previously encountered with perfect accuracy.

features.name: Natural Communication
features.description: Make Communication checks to converse with specific animal types and sense the health, needs, and recent history of plants. They respond with their level of intelligence and knowledge.

features.name: Weather Prediction
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to accurately predict weather patterns up to 24 hours in advance.

features.name: Multi-limbed
features.description: You have additional limbs. Each purchase of this feature grants you one extra limb.

features.name: Personal Vehicle
features.description: You own a vehicle that allows you to travel quickly.

features.name: Stable Housing
features.description: You have access to a home that supports more than just yourself.

features.name: Lock
features.description: You can place a protective barrier around a container or room. Your bonus to resist someone breaking into it is 3 × your Intelligence. You can only have one lock active at a time, but can disable and activate a new one at any time from anywhere.

features.name: Object Encryption
features.description: You can seal items in a protective field to prevent tampering.

features.name: Debt
features.description: Someone owes you something. Work with the GM to determine the nature of the debt and what benefits you might gain when attempting to collect.

features.name: The Prophesied One
features.description: A prophecy involves you. Those who believe in it will go to great lengths to assist you. Work with the GM to determine the prophecy's nature and cost.

features.name: Telepathy
features.description: Make Communication checks to establish two-way mental communication with any intelligent being regardless of distance or barriers. No range limitations and allows deep mental contact.

features.name: Psychometry
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to perceive the recent history and emotional imprints of objects through touch.

features.name: Dream Walking
features.description: Make Communication checks to enter and interact with the dreams of sleeping individuals you can see.

features.name: Spirit Communication
features.description: Make Communication checks to speak with the spirits of the recently deceased in the immediate area.

features.name: Technopathy
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to interface directly with electronic devices and understand their functions/data.

features.name: Psychic Link
features.description: You can share or transfer memories with a touch, or form a temporary psychic connection with another being. This can be used for strategic coordination, emotional support, or unique insight.

features.name: Mystic Guardian
features.description: You can create temporary magical guardians or constructs that can complete simple tasks. These can act as watchmen, couriers, or assistants.

features.name: Spiritual Bind
features.description: You can temporarily bind yourself to an object or location, granting limited influence, observation, or protection.

features.name: Auratic Sway
features.description: Emit a subtle aura that affects emotions or moods in the immediate vicinity. You can make an Intimidation or Communication check against everyone nearby to slightly alter their mood or emotions.

features.name: Supernatural Intuition
features.description: You can sense the presence of supernatural beings and forces. This ability can act as an early warning system or guide your party toward hidden dangers or opportunities.

features.name: Temporal Echo
features.description: You can temporarily replay past events regarding persons, places, and objects. This ability allows you to uncover secrets, retrace steps, or resolve mysteries.

features.name: Forbiddance
features.description: Once per rest, over one hour, you may create a ward protecting up to a 100x100 space from observation, teleportation, and communication. Choose a category of being (with GM). Chosen creatures take (10 + Focus or Power) damage per turn in the area. The ward lasts one day. If used daily for 100 days in the same spot, it becomes permanent.

features.name: Glyph of Warding
features.description: It takes one hour to set up a trap that releases one of your special attacks when triggered. The glyph may not be moved. You can have a number of active traps equal to your Intelligence score. Hidden traps require an Awareness or Intelligence check against double your Intelligence to detect.

features.name: Quantum Pocket
features.description: You can store and retrieve objects in a subspace storage, allowing you to carry large or dangerous items without arousing suspicion or taking up inventory space.

features.name: Alchemist
features.description: You are a master of creating single-use experimental tinctures and tonics. You will need time to gather ingredients, requiring an Intelligence or Awareness check to forage, or a Communication check to purchase. The GM decides DCs, time, and costs.

features.name: Ritualist
features.description: You can create single-use magical rituals. The GM determines the check difficulty. It takes one uninterrupted hour to complete and may require special ingredients like a specific location, blood, or a rare object.

features.name: Inventor
features.description: You can create single-use technological inventions. The GM determines the Intelligence check difficulty. It takes a number of hours of active downtime equal to the difficulty minus 10 and requires a suitable lab or workshop.

features.name: Sponsor
features.description: Someone has invested in you, providing greater access to resources. They are inclined to protect their investment, but you are beholden to them and they might cut their losses if things get too dicey.

features.name: Streetwise Network
features.description: You have connections throughout various segments of society, providing you with valuable information about local people and places wherever you travel.

features.name: Underworld Connection
features.description: You maintain a reliable contact within the criminal underworld who can facilitate communication and deliver messages discreetly. Your connection can also provide contraband, information, or covert assistance.

features.name: Well Connected
features.description: Once per session, if you say, "I Know a Guy," work with the GM to create an NPC who can help with a specific task. The GM secretly determines your relationship strength and what favor or payment is required.

features.name: Social Network
features.description: You have extensive connections with various influential individuals. These connections can provide critical assistance, such as opening doors to exclusive events, securing resources, or obtaining valuable information.

features.name: Ancestral Knowledge
features.description: You can communicate with ancestral spirits for guidance.

features.name: Dreamwalker
features.description: You can enter and interact with dreams.

features.name: Divine Insight
features.description: You occasionally glimpse alternate dimensions, supernatural realms, and otherworldly realities.

features.name: Prodigy
features.description: After 1 hour of focused study, gain a Tier bonus to checks involving that specific topic until your next rest.

features.name: Future Sight
features.description: You receive visions of a future that may or may not happen. Once per session, you may attempt to force one of these visions. Roll a d100; the higher the number, the more accurate and less vague the vision becomes.

features.name: Perception Filter
features.description: Temporarily render objects or areas unnoticed by others. May require Stealth checks.

features.name: Know It All
features.description: If you spend one minute explaining how to do something better, another character can add your Intelligence to any check, provided they follow your advice.

features.name: Bard
features.description: You can sing a tune to inspire others, giving a +4 bonus to any check for one minute, a number of times per day equal to your Communication score.

features.name: Mind-Reading
features.description: Make Communication checks to read surface thoughts of conscious beings within line of sight. Range is limited to visual contact and surface-level thoughts only.

features.name: Memory Manipulation
features.description: Make Communication checks to view, modify, or implant memories in willing or unconscious subjects. Cannot be used on actively resisting targets.

features.name: Consciousness Transfer
features.description: Make Communication checks to temporarily swap consciousness with willing participants.

features.name: Quantum Tunneling
features.description: Make Mobility checks to teleport through solid barriers by exploiting quantum mechanics (short range). Work with GM to establish specific range and material limitations.

features.name: Probability Control
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to subtly influence probability, making unlikely events more or less likely to occur. Work with GM to determine scope and limitations.

features.name: Reality Anchoring
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to stabilize local reality, preventing supernatural alterations or dimensional instabilities.

features.name: Hexer
features.description: You are able to inflict complex, lasting, and nearly incurable curses. The target must be aware and within 18 spaces of you for one minute. You must know their true name and/or a special condition. Work with the GM for effects and lifting conditions.

features.name: Matter Manipulation
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to temporarily convert one mundane material into another, or transform one object into another of similar weight and density. Work with GM to establish duration and material limitations.

features.name: Molecular Control
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to rearrange molecular structures of small objects, changing their properties or form. Work with GM to determine scope and limitations.

features.name: Dimensional Storage
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to create pocket dimensions for storing objects without weight or bulk.

features.name: Hidden Trap
features.description: It takes one hour to set up a trap that releases one of your special attacks. You can set a number of traps equal to your Awareness per rest. Hidden traps require an Awareness check against double your Awareness to detect and a Mobility check to disarm or avoid.

features.name: Bleeding Edge
features.description: Your technology is the most advanced, allowing greater feats. However, it can only be repaired, maintained, or upgraded using very specific or hard-to-find tools, methods, or materials.

features.name: Time Perception
features.description: Make Awareness checks to perceive the flow of time differently, seeing events in slow motion or experiencing accelerated time.

features.name: Dimensional Sight
features.description: Make Awareness checks to see into parallel dimensions, alternate realities, or through dimensional barriers.

features.name: Perfect Sanctuary
features.description: Create an impenetrable zone around you and your allies for a short duration. Nothing can enter or leave this zone without your permission. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and duration.

features.name: Corruption
features.description: Work with GM to establish corruption mechanics. Choose a trigger condition that grants significant power bonuses but risks permanent character corruption through failed resistance rolls.

features.name: Simultaneous Processing
features.description: You can perform hundreds of simple mental tasks simultaneously. This allows for unique problem-solving, such as tracking multiple variables or analyzing large amounts of data.

features.name: True Precognition
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to perceive detailed future events up to days in advance, with accuracy based on roll success.

features.name: Consciousness Network
features.description: Make Communication checks to link multiple minds into a temporary collective consciousness, sharing all thoughts and knowledge.

features.name: Quantum Consciousness
features.description: Make Awareness checks to exist in multiple probable states simultaneously, experiencing different possible realities.

features.name: Reality Revision
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to make minor alterations to recent events (within the last hour), changing their outcomes. Work with GM to establish limitations and consequences.

features.name: Time Manipulation
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to slow, accelerate, or briefly pause time in localized areas around yourself. Work with GM to determine specific capabilities and narrative impact.

features.name: Causal Manipulation
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to alter cause-and-effect relationships, making effects occur without their normal causes. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and consequences.

features.name: Immortality
features.description: You are immortal; you can be killed but you will return to life after 24 hours. Work with the GM to establish a limitation for this immortality, a way in which you can truly be killed. Also, determine where you return and if there are any changes that affect you.

features.name: Self-Sacrifice
features.description: As you activate this feature, increase your Tier by 4 for 6 rounds. At the end of the 6 rounds, you die. May change the penalty/bonus for something equivalent. Cannot use if you have abilities that prevent death.

features.name: Matter Creation
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to create small amounts of any non-living matter from quantum foam. Work with GM to establish limitations and energy requirements.

features.name: Universal Translation
features.description: Make Communication checks to understand and communicate in any language, including alien or interdimensional tongues.

features.name: Dimensional Travel
features.description: Make Mobility checks to open portals to alternate dimensions, parallel Earths, or entirely different realities. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and requirements.

features.name: Reality Programming
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to temporarily alter the fundamental laws of physics in a small area around yourself. Work with GM to determine scope and limitations.
